rationale: The cited paper is not a generic background match: its topic ("donation versus discount promotions" in cause-related marketing) substantially overlaps the citing paper’s core domain and consumer-response mechanisms. Given the citing note says it extends prior cause-related marketing work and tests new framing/amount effects, this 2011 JMRK article is a plausible theoretical/comparison foundation rather than an incidental mention, so it should be retained for full relation review.
